age.evidence: Agent: "age kitni hogi aapki sir?" Customer: "30."

gender.evidence: Agent: "age kitni hogi aapki sir?" (Agent addresses customer as sir)

occupation.evidence: Customer: "Job hai, business bhi hai, dono hai."

occupation_detail.evidence: Customer: "Job hai, business bhi hai, dono hai."

income_band_inr.evidence: Customer: "Monthly 60 hai mera." (60k/month = 7.2LPA) and "Business toh mera ek dedh lakh ka hai mahine ka." (1.5L/month = 18LPA). Total > 25LPA.

temperature.evidence: Customer: "Haan toh mam aap mujhe plan samjha ke batana. Main 7 baje ke baad aap mujhe call kar do 7 ke baad."

monthly_savings_capacity_inr.evidence: Customer: "Monthly 60 hai mera." (Job) + "dedh lakh ka hai mahine ka." (Business). High income implies high savings capacity.

decision_maker_status.evidence: Customer: "Main 7 baje ke baad aap mujhe call kar do 7 ke baad." (Implies he is the one to decide/listen)

agent_promises: company within interest refund kar rahi hai

missed_opportunities: Did not ask about specific financial goals beyond the pitch.

approachability.reasoning: Customer explicitly asked for a callback at 7 PM and expressed interest in understanding the plan.

call_narrative.opening_hook: The agent introduced a combined Term Plus Mutual Fund plan from Tata AIA, and the customer engaged immediately.
call_narrative.customer_response: The customer was cooperative, providing income and location details, and requested a callback at a specific time.
call_narrative.key_event: The customer requested a callback after 7 PM to discuss the plan in detail.
call_narrative.ending: The agent agreed to call back after 7 PM as requested by the customer.

key_quotes: Main 7 baje ke baad aap mujhe call kar do 7 ke baad.
Haan toh mam aap mujhe plan samjha ke batana.
red_flags: Agent made guaranteed return claims (interest refund).
Agent misrepresented product as a combined Term/Mutual Fund plan.
